mapper.sql: id, proj_id, member, member_name, member_code, dept_code, unit_name, discipline, title_code, edu_level, work_time, work_ratio, ranking, note, sex, author_type_code, memberrole_code, secret_level
mapper.select:
select spia.id as rowId, spia.member as member, puser.name as memberName, puser.code as authorTypeCode, ccspt.name as authorTypeName, spia.member_code as memberCode, spia.edu_level as eduLevel,csel.name as eduLevelName, sauthororder.code as ranking,sauthororder.name as rankingName, spia.title_code as title,ccsti.name as titleName,puser.account as account,spia.work_time as workTime
,spia.work_ratio as workRatio from srm_projects_info_member spia left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=spia.member left join ct_srm_person_type ccspt on ccspt.code=spia.author_type_code left join ct_srm_title_info ccsti on ccsti.code=spia.title_code left join ct_srm_edu_level csel on csel.code=spia.edu_level left join ct_srm_paper_author_order sauthororder on sauthororder.code=spia.ranking where spia.proj_id=#{parentId}
